keynotes.text: KEY-NOTES TO THE MATERIA MEDICA by HENRY N. GUERNSEY, M.D. Presented by Médi-T BALSAM OF PERU Nose.-- Profuse, thick discharge from, whether chronic or otherwise. Ozna with ulceration. Stomach.-- Vomiting of food and mucus; catarrh of stomach. Mucous diarrha, etc. Chest.-- Cough mucous and purulent expectoration. Phthisis of mucus; vomica in lungs. Urine.-- Scanty, with mucous sediment; catarrh of bladder. Generalities.-- Debility ; rhagades of nipples and fingers. Copyright © Médi-T 2000
